testSuite.details: 83 tests passed across 9 suites (form-validation, templates API, submit API, submissions API x3, DynamicForm, TemplateEditor, submission-detail). No failures. TypeScript: npx tsc --noEmit exited clean.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: prisma migrate deploy runs without errors on fresh DB
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Migration was applied via Supabase SQL Editor (documented in decisions.md Task 1). Fresh-DB replay requires a live Railway/Supabase environment — deferred to post-deploy QA.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All new API routes return correct HTTP status codes (200/201/400/401/403/404/429/500)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Tests confirm: GET 200, POST 201, validation failures 400, no-session 401, wrong-role 403, unknown ID 404, 6th request 429. Minor deviation: DELETE returns 204 not 200 — see findings.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: POST /api/templates/[id]/submit returns 429 on 6th request from same IP within 1 hour
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Test 'POST /submit returns 429 on 6th request from same IP+templateId :: returns 429 when rate limit exceeded' passes. Rate-limit key: submit:${templateId}:${ip}, limit 5 per hour (src/app/api/templates/[id]/submit/route.ts:32).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: DELETE /api/templates/[id] returns 200; FormSubmission records remain after deletion
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: FormSubmission.templateId is String? with onDelete: SetNull — submissions survive template deletion by design (schema.prisma). DELETE returns 204 (not 200 as written in AC) — noted as minor finding. Test 'DELETE /api/templates/[id] :: returns 204 and deletes template' passes.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: FormSubmission.companyName and templateName populated correctly at submit time
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Test 'POST /submit creates FormSubmission with correct snapshots on happy path :: returns 201 and stores correct templateName, companyName, email' passes. Code at submit/route.ts:155 (templateName: template.name) and :214 (fieldLabel: field.label) confirms snapshots.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: FieldResponse.fieldLabel snapshot preserved after FormField deletion
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: fieldLabel stored at submit time (submit/route.ts:214). fieldId is String? with onDelete: SetNull — orphan FieldResponse records keep their fieldLabel. Detail page renders orphans in 'Other responses' section (submissions/[id]/page.tsx:205).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Unit tests pass: field type validation, rate limiting, companyName extraction, localStorage
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: 83 tests pass: form-validation.test.ts (11 tests), submit.test.ts (12 tests including rate limit and companyName), DynamicForm.test.ts (12 tests including localStorage).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: No TypeScript compilation errors (next build succeeds)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit exited with no output (0 errors). Confirmed in decisions.md entries for every task.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Existing auth flow (login → dashboard) unchanged
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx has only 1 git commit (initial commit 89a8c3f) — not touched by the feature branch. Middleware allowlist additions are additive only.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Templates button on dashboard opens /dashboard/templates
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: dashboard/page.tsx: Link href='/dashboard/templates' with text 'Templates' (line 57).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Templates page shows list: name, created date, Edit / Copy Link / Delete buttons
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: TemplatesTable.tsx renders columns: Name, Created (en-GB locale date), and Actions (Edit link, Copy Link button, Delete button).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: New Template opens editor
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: templates/page.tsx: Link href='/dashboard/templates/new' with text 'New Template'. /dashboard/templates/new/page.tsx wraps TemplateEditor.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Editor allows setting name, adding steps, and adding fields per step
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: TemplateEditor.tsx: name input, Add Step button, per-step Add Field button. Full step/field management confirmed in component.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Each field configures: type, label, placeholder, required flag
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: TemplateEditor renders type select (7 FieldTypes), label input, placeholder input, required checkbox per field.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Fields and steps reorder via up/down buttons
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: reorderItems utility in TemplateEditorUtils.ts, tested: 'reorderItems moves first item down', 'moves last item up', boundary no-ops.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Cannot save template without at least one step and one field
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: validateTemplate in TemplateEditorUtils.ts returns error for empty steps or steps with 0 fields. Tested: 'save_blocked_no_steps', 'save_blocked_empty_step'. Applied in editor before API call.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Company Name field added automatically and cannot be deleted (Delete button hidden)
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: API auto-prepends Company Name with isProtected:true (templates/route.ts:82-88). hasDeleteButton returns false for isProtected fields (TemplateEditorUtils:47). Tested: 'protected_field_no_delete'.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Copy Link copies [NEXTAUTH_URL]/onboarding/[templateId] to clipboard
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: TemplatesTable.tsx: baseUrl (process.env.NEXTAUTH_URL from server page.tsx) + '/onboarding/' + id. Clipboard API used with alert fallback for non-HTTPS environments.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Delete shows confirm dialog; after confirmation template removed from list
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: TemplatesTable.tsx handleDelete: window.confirm('Are you sure?') before DELETE API call. router.refresh() updates list after success.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Client opens /onboarding/[templateId], sees form by template structure, fills and submits
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: page.tsx fetches /api/templates/[id]/public, passes template to DynamicForm. DynamicForm renders steps/fields from template structure with ProgressBar, per-step navigation, all field types.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: After submission, entry appears in dashboard: company name, template name, date, status NEW
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: SubmissionsTable (MerchantsTable.tsx) shows companyName, templateName, createdAt date, status badge (NEW rendered as 'New' in blue). FormSubmission.status defaults to NEW.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Submission detail page shows all field answers and allows status change
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: submissions/[id]/page.tsx renders FieldResponse values grouped by step, orphans in 'Other responses'. StatusChanger component allows NEW→IN_REVIEW→APPROVED|REJECTED transitions.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Opening deleted template link shows 'This link is no longer available'
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: onboarding/[templateId]/page.tsx: 404 response from /api/templates/[id]/public renders 'This link is no longer available' page (line 36).

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Form saves draft to localStorage; reopening restores data
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: DynamicForm: saveDraft writes form-draft-[templateId] on every field change, loadDraft restores on mount (hasMountedRef guard prevents overwrite), clearDraft on successful submit. Tested: 'saveDraft writes JSON', 'loadDraft restores', 'clearDraft removes', error-silencing tests.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All admin interface text is in English
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Dashboard page: English labels ('Submissions', 'Manage client onboarding submissions', 'New', 'In Review', 'Approved', 'Rejected'). Templates page: English. Submission detail: English. TemplateEditor: English. No Russian text found in admin routes.

findings.title: DELETE /api/templates/[id] returns 204, not 200 as written in tech-spec AC
findings.expected: HTTP 200 per tech-spec acceptance criteria TS-4
findings.actual: HTTP 204 No Content (route.ts:181: return new NextResponse(null, { status: 204 }))
findings.reproduction: DELETE /api/templates/[id] with valid admin session and existing template ID. Response is 204 with no body.
findings.note: HTTP 204 is semantically correct for DELETE with no response body and is validated by the unit test. The tech-spec AC text was imprecise. No functional impact.

notes: All 8 new API route files have corresponding test files with meaningful assertions.
TemplateEditor utility functions (validateTemplate, hasDeleteButton, reorderItems, buildSavePayload) fully tested in TemplateEditor.test.tsx.
DynamicForm localStorage utilities and step validation tested in DynamicForm.test.ts.
Submission detail isValidFileUrl guard tested in submission-detail.test.ts.

TemplatesTable.tsx client component (copy link, delete dialog) not unit-tested — browser interaction only. Acceptable: window.confirm and clipboard.writeText cannot be meaningfully unit-tested in jsdom without significant mocking.
No coverage tooling (--coverage) configured in jest config — threshold cannot be checked.

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: TS-1: prisma migrate deploy runs without errors on fresh DB
deferredToPostDeploy.reason: Migration was applied via Supabase SQL Editor against existing DB. Running prisma migrate deploy on a genuinely fresh database requires Railway/Supabase environment.
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationCondition: Fresh Railway deployment with empty Supabase database
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: After deploy, check Railway build logs for 'Running migrations' step and confirm it exits 0. Alternatively run: npx prisma migrate deploy against a new Supabase project and confirm all 5 tables are created.
